title: Cast before calling __Vdpiimwrap_ function may yield wrong address in VerilatedDpiOpenVar

features.name: dpi_import_openarray_bit_sized
features.description: Code should include a DPI-C import function with open array parameters of bit type where the bit width triggers IData casting
features.snippet: import "DPI-C" context function void dpi_testOpenArrayPtr(input bit a[], input bit b[]);

features.name: public_flat_bit_signal_small_width
features.description: Code should include a bit-type signal with verilator public_flat attribute and width that triggers IData casting (1-16 bits)
features.snippet:
bit single_bit /* verilator public_flat */;
bit [15:0] sixteen_bit /* verilator public_flat */;

features.name: dpi_openarray_passed_public_flat_bit
features.description: Code should include a DPI call passing public_flat bit signals as open array arguments where IData cast is applied
